subject: A translucent ghostly figure with a pale, hairless head and elongated outstretched arms emerges from a tall freestanding doorframe, gliding into a misty corridor of identical standing doorways. A second similar spectral figure is visible deeper in the corridor, also emerging from a doorframe. The ghost's lower body trails off into rippling vertical streaks suggesting flowing energy or robes dissolving into mist. Many disembodied hands reach out from doorways throughout the scene.
description: A luminous, mist-shrouded scene rendered almost entirely in cold blue tones. The central figure is a glowing spectral entity emerging through a tall ornately-framed doorway: bald head, hollow expression, arms stretched wide as if measuring or warding the space. The body below the chest fragments into vertical rippling lines that read as flowing spectral robes or dissipating mist. A second identical ghost is visible mid-ground left, also emerging from a doorframe. Throughout the scene, additional reaching hands and partial limbs extend from other doorways into the foggy void. The setting is an impossible corridor of freestanding doorframes receding into haze.
foreground: spectral figure with outstretched arms emerging from an ornate doorframe
background: corridor of standing doorframes receding into blue fog, with additional ghosts and reaching hands
